model._note_case: ChannelThermal: nonperiodic channel, steady query, 5 fields including temperature.
model._note_layout: Physical channel units. Test module_radius only if local geometry scale is uncertain.
model._note_env_tokens: Centered environment grid. Test 12x4,16x6,24x8 for spatial resolution.
model._note_geometry_time: nonperiodic uses direct wall/channel geometry; no query time by default.
model._note_use_hyper_context: true lets decoder attend to learned H; false keeps organizer diagnostics but removes H from decoding.
model._note_hyper_geometry_bias: Query-to-hyperedge coordinate bias; useful for plume/wall placement.
model._note_auxiliary_paths: A_me shapes organizer; direct/near/global reveal redundant decoder shortcuts.
model._note_direct_residual_gate_init: 0 keeps direct shortcut nearly off; try 0.01 or 0.1 only in shortcut ablations.

data._note_paths: Reads existing demo datasets in place; missing files fail real training and synthetic remains separate.

training._note_training: Use --inspect-data and dry-run before real ablations.
training._note_module_heat_feature_mode: case_relative, dataset_scaled, or both; tests whether heat magnitude needs case-local or dataset-scale encoding.

organizer_regularization._note: Weak generic anti-collapse regularization for H; no case-specific plume/wall/downstream priors.
